skills.name: Agent-Skills
skills.desc: Curated Agent Skills for Microsoft & Azure – giving AI coding assistants structured, real-time expertise from Microsoft Learn docs.
skills.install: git clone https://github.com/MicrosoftDocs/Agent-Skills.git  # browse the awesome list

skills.name: agent-toolkit
skills.desc: A curated collection of skills for AI coding agents. Skills are packaged instructions and scripts that extend agent capabilities across development, documentation, planning, and professional workflows.
skills.install: git clone https://github.com/softaworks/agent-toolkit.git  # browse the awesome list

skills.name: anywhere-agents
skills.desc: One config to rule all your AI agents: portable (every project, every session), effective (curated writing, routing, skills), and safer (destructive-command guard).
skills.install: git clone https://github.com/yzhao062/anywhere-agents.git  # browse the awesome list

skills.name: mcp
skills.desc: Official Microsoft Learn MCP Server and CLI tool – powering LLMs and AI agents with real-time, trusted Microsoft docs & code samples.

skills.name: obsidian-skills
skills.desc: Agent skills for Obsidian. Teach your agent to use Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas, and use the CLI.
